I now order all physical sickness patterns coded into my heritage to cease to exist. I take the sword of the Holy Spirit and sever all links to diseases, cancer, digestive and eating disorders, ulcers, and all tendencies to form tumors.

I come again all patterns of female disorders, menstrual problems, hormone imbalance, infertility, and sexual coldness. I now break the links with all male sexual disorders, impotence, and transmitted diseases. I come against all physical deformities, hearing problems, immune deficiencies, weak eyes, bad teeth, and flat teeth. I comes against all migraines, mental retardation, lung problems, arthritis, skin diseases, and bone disorders.

I renounce all patterns of physical trauma that hooked into me genetically. I severed that connection. I come against the root cause of all physical disorders and unexplained weakness.

Lord. free me from the effects of these sick pathways etched into my ancestry. Stop their propagation. Father, forgive those in my family for all the ways they have chosen sickness to avoid life, for the ways they have tried to meet their needs in unhealthy ways.

Let an ingrained pattern of “choosing life“ run like a river through my bloodline. I praise You, Lord.
